programme.title: Opportunity Cost
programme.desc: As five new survivalists begin their first days in the Mackenzie River Delta, they are met with an abundance of challenges in the uncharted Arctic terrain.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About Singapore
programme.desc: 10 Things You Don't Know About Singapore reveals intriguing details about this tiny country that even most locals wouldn't know! It uncovers new twists behind historical tales, figures and places.

programme.title: Let Them Bake Cake
programme.desc: During the mid-20th century, two unlikely characters find themselves in competition to simplify the lives of homemakers across the country by creating a tasty but easy boxed cake mix.

programme.title: Soda Rising: Birth Of Pop
programme.desc: In the late 1800s, two pharmacists 1500 miles apart race to create healthy, non-alcoholic beverage options, kickstarting the entire soda industry with their breakout hits: Hires Root Beer and Dr. Pepper.

programme.title: Wonders Of The Ancient World
programme.desc: Remarkable feats of engineering from our ancient past span the globe. Some are amazing in size. Others in sophistication. Some are so strange they border on inexplicable.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle And The Beyond
programme.desc: All over the world are forbidden 'triangles' - mysterious regions where ships, planes, and people enter and then just disappear. They are found in Bermuda, Alaska, Japan and elsewhere. But why?

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. programme.title: The Heat

programme.title: In Netanya, Israel
programme.desc: Episode 9: Netanya, Israel - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Krav Maga with Masters Ran Nakash and Avivit Oftek Cohen.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Gennady Golovkin vs. Grzegorz Proksa
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the American debut of future unified middleweight world champion Gennady Golovkin, who takes on Grzegorz Proska. Also on the card, action from kickboxing star Nieky Holzken.

programme.title: Fukuoka, Japan: Show 5
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Abi, Hakuho, Takakeisho and Asanoyama from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Luis Maysonet
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (48-3 22 KO 150 lbs) looks to continue his winning streak against Luis Maysonet (28-5 28 KO) in a 10-round contest from Foxwoods Resort Mashantucket CT USA.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Nkazimulo Zulu vs. Jake Hadley
programme.desc: This episode features a flyweight championship bout as Jake Hadley takes on the veteran Nkazimulo Zulu. Bonus coverage includes Mutuale Basambombo vs. HP Van Staden and Christian Bobo vs. Adrian Sanchez.

programme.title: WCCB Uisma Lima vs. Shervantaigh Koopman
programme.desc: The IBO Super Welterweight World Championship is on the line when champion Uisma Lima of Portugal defends against undefeated Shervantaigh Koopman at the Emperors Palace in Kempton Park, South Africa. Lima claimed the title with a unanimous decision victory over Sukhdeep Singh Bhatti in December, and will be looking to make his first successful defense against the IBO Intercontinental titleholder, Koopman.

programme.title: In Netanya, Israel
programme.desc: Episode 9: Netanya, Israel - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Krav Maga with Masters Ran Nakash and Avivit Oftek Cohen.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Gennady Golovkin vs. Grzegorz Proksa

programme.title: Fukuoka, Japan: Show 5
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Abi, Hakuho, Takakeisho and Asanoyama from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Luis Maysonet
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (48-3 22 KO 150 lbs) looks to continue his winning streak against Luis Maysonet (28-5 28 KO) in a 10-round contest from Foxwoods Resort Mashantucket CT USA.

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.desc: 更专业、更丰富、更多元化的车款资讯，分享给观众。

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: 小姐不熙娣
programme.desc: 由娱乐圈最具女王气势之艺人小S徐熙娣主持，搭档幽默风趣的助理主持人派翠克，每集邀请多位时下最红、最具话题性之艺人及网红上节目，透过小S深厚及麻辣的主持功力，与现场来宾激荡出无敌之「笑果」。

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping Of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini's disappearance captivated the nation, but her abduction story unraveled when it was revealed she was not a kidnap victim as she initially claimed.

programme.title: Murder At The Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.title: Chicken Gizzard and Poutine
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a smothered chicken gizzard poutine, which mixes traditional, Southern-fried chicken gizzards with French-Canadian fries, gravy and cheese curds for a decadent global meal.

programme.title: Deep South Bouillabaisse
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines French cuisine with deep Southern cooking in her take on bouillabaisse. She starts by making a homemade broth with fish remnants, vegetable scraps, spices and more in a pot.

programme.title: Chicken Chow Fun
programme.desc: Rachael demonstrates how to make your own takeout at home and how to stock your pantry for today's recipe, chicken chow fun, a Chinese-American favourite with a rice-noodle base and vegetables.

The contestants cook for Immunity in a Team Challenge at the Queen Victoria Night Market, with street food on the menu. In teams of five, they must create two dishes, one protein-led and one vegetarian.

programme.title: Jacinthe and Serge
programme.desc: Serge and Jacinthe have often travelled to the East Coast over the years to visit family. Now they want to find a permanent home for their visits, one they can pass down for generations.

programme.title: Small Space Big Taste
programme.desc: They say big things come in small packages, and in this episode host Michael Yo discovers that big flavours can come in small dining spaces as he squeezes into a four-table pancake house in Amsterdam.
Today's featured homes showcase dramatic transformations. First, we have the "My Modern Journal House," a home that has shed its outdated appearance and embraced a sleek, modern style.

programme.title: Murder At The Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.title: How She Caught A Killer
programme.desc: The Route 40 Killer targets sex workers with an unknown motive. Detective Linda Murphy goes undercover and gets entangled in a chilling cat-and-mouse game, reminiscent of The Silence of the Lambs.
In the early hours, the four-member team races from Seoul to Jeonju. From design and interior renovations to store menu development, everything is in their hands!
Does 'riverside view' mean that little stream over there...? What's the shocking truth about their first-day accommodation that left the Dokbakz crew furious?
Today, we'll introduce you to popular "no-interior" homes. We'll showcase the "Self-Made 3 No House," where unnecessary elements are completely removed, and the "Hide-and-Seek House".
Andy's mum Maree is in the kitchen to set an elimination challenge inspired by some of the Allen household's classic retro dishes. Contestants must make them MasterChef worthy, or risk going home.

programme.title: Smothered Meatballs with Spaetzle
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a classic German dish of smothered chicken meatballs and spaetzle, inspired by the traditional Southern meal of chicken and dumplings.

programme.title: Iraqi Salmon & Date Brownies
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Orlando: Campbell House
programme.desc: Duke is BACK and ready to flip more zombies with our expert Zombie flippers, Keith and Alynne. The team checks out a vintage property in a desirable neighbourhood that needs quite an overhaul.

programme.title: Vera Eggplant Parm
programme.desc: Inspired by international film star and cookbook author Sophia Loren's recipe for eggplant parmigiana, Rachael makes the dish in the proper Italian style, with aged Parmigiano Reggiano cheese.
On a friendship trip to Thailand with real friends, the "Dokbakz" gather to celebrate. Their joy is short-lived, as they decide to pick the one who will shoulder the cost of the accommodation.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Aubrey is rushing to Chicago for the birth of her sister's baby. Her plane is grounded in a snowstorm, leaving her stranded for the night at a small-town airport.

programme.title: Orlando: Campbell House
programme.desc: Duke is BACK and ready to flip more zombies with our expert Zombie flippers, Keith and Alynne. The team checks out a vintage property in a desirable neighbourhood that needs quite an overhaul.

programme.title: 收视指南
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。《收视指南》栏目专门介绍央视的播出内容。

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 记住乡愁
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: 走遍中国
programme.desc: 主要以中国的某一城市（或地域、或主题）为选题范围，选取其最具的历史传承、风土人情、杰出人物、自然风光和发展变化以连续一周每天30分钟播出的大容量，向世界全景式地展现新世纪的中国城市（或地域）形象。

programme.title: 海峡两岸
programme.desc: 节目宗旨是"跟踪海峡热点，反映两岸民意"，节目分为两个版块：第一个是"热点扫描"，主要报道当日的近期台湾岛内的热点新闻；第二个是"热点透视"，当日或近期涉台热点深度报道及两岸专家对此事的评论，并对两岸各个层面的交流交往进行跟踪报道。

programme.desc: Gordon sends his remaining contenders to Wales, where they must harvest seaweed on Anglesey. He also challenges them to sell pizza to tourists at Portmeirion.

programme.title: 凤凰聚焦
programme.desc: 《凤凰聚焦》锁定全球和本地重大的时政话题、社会事件及新闻热点，选题超越地域界限，原创性挖掘事件的背景与真相，配以记者的现场调查，梳理来龙去脉，以高清的新闻镜片，摸清看透热点大事，充份展现凤凰团队深挖时事议题的功力。

programme.title: 石评天下
programme.desc: 《石评天下》是一档深度政治评论性的周播专题节目。节目透过三个环：「石观世界」、「齐论古今」及「平说新语」 ，由资深评论员石齐平以独特的观点。

programme.title: 凤凰全球连线 (15/4/26)
programme.desc: 《凤凰全球连线》为你带来世界各地的热点新闻，并深入探讨事件始末因由，分析事情的重要性。主持人会于直播时段，通过卫星、电话与全球各地的凤凰卫视记者、特约记者、评论员连线，向你汇报当天要闻。

programme.title: 有报天天读 (15/4/26)
programme.desc: 有报天天读搜罗全球主流的媒体和重要报纸、杂志的最新资讯和精华焦点，内容充实，资讯丰富，节奏明快，充满动感和创意，是个既有个性，也有独到见解的节目。

programme.title: 军情观察室

programme.title: Garden Gaming
programme.desc: Duck is getting frustrated with his new computer game, so Sarah builds a new version.

programme.title: Toy Tidy
programme.desc: Duck has been leaving his toys everywhere, so Sarah helps him tidy his bedroom.

programme.title: Can-Bots
programme.desc: Stanley is very busy, so he invents three little robots called the Can Bots to help. They begin well but soon start getting out of hand. Stanley has some reprogramming to do.

programme.title: Noisy Night
programme.desc: There's a funny noise around town. It's distracting the children's music practice and keeping everyone else up. Stanley investigates with the help of Myrtle.

programme.title: I Could Be The Best Dancer In The Whole Entire World
programme.desc: From disco dancing frogs to skipping puffins and lions that love ballet, the talking animals discuss the best things about dancing.

programme.title: It's Time for a Folk Tale
programme.desc: JoJo, Gran Gran and the Nature Club hear a special folk tale about a spider named Anansi.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: The Organising Badge
programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.title: The Grandparents Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: Song of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: The Continent of Africa
programme.desc: Glitch takes Tala to the continent of Africa to help her with an Academy project.

programme.title: Avocado
programme.desc: The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: Banana
programme.desc: Banana reveals another secret about herself in the opera piece, "I've Got a Secret".

programme.title: How to be a Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato shows the Grape Kids a Supertato training film, but Evil Pea sneaks in to take over Tato Tower. The Grape Kids use the rug launcher to eject Evil Pea out of the tower.

programme.title: The Throne Thief
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Chilli are playing when, suddenly, they hear a scream and discover an upset Evil Pea in her freezer. Her throne has been stolen! Who would do such a thing?

programme.title: Musical Statues
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po enjoy a game of musical statues. It takes the Teletubbies a few turns to work out what to do when the music stops; they must stand very still.

programme.title: Plane
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'plane' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We explore a flying plane, a landing plane, a fast plane and even meeting a sneezing plane!

programme.title: Messy Needs A Fur-Cut
programme.desc: When Messy accidentally sets Farmer Fuddle's sheep loose, he must help round them up in time for their annual wool shearing. But will Messy be brave enough to get a fur cut of his own?

programme.title: Swophenge
programme.desc: Nori and Preston are creating a circle of standing stones, just like the ancients of Swoppiton used to make. The stones are big - will it take more than Mojo's crane top to move them?

programme.title: Show and Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: The Diary Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Hey Quacky!
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Go Jetters Academy: Ghost Crabs
programme.desc: Glitch takes all the sand from the Academy beach, leaving the local crabs with nowhere to hide from hungry seagulls. Can the Go Jetters repair the beach before it's too late?

programme.title: Early Baby
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Duck Cake
programme.desc: Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake.

programme.title: Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Curry Quest
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Andy and the Sooty Tern
programme.desc: Andy heads to the Galapagos Islands in search of a seabird called a sooty tern. Along the way, he meets a fish called a trevally that leaps out of the water trying to catch birds.

programme.title: Ball
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: The Pizza Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are... interesting!

programme.title: The Train Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.title: Nomads, Mongolia
programme.desc: Glitch offends some nomads in Mongolia, so it's down to the Go Jetters to take the reins.

programme.title: Gliding, Argentina
programme.desc: Glitch gatecrashes an academy gliding test, causing calamity in the skies over Argentina.

programme.title: Grudge Match

programme.desc: Sarah and Duck are keen to find out who delivered their Christmas presents to them.

programme.title: Plate Escape

programme.desc: Stanley is very busy, so he invents three little robots called the Can Bots to help. They begin well but soon start getting out of hand. Stanley has some reprogramming to do.

programme.desc: The talking animals talk about all the things they love about the ocean.

programme.title: Musical Statues

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mau Bikin Romantis Ternyata Bikin Nangis
programme.desc: Deva (Ika Diharjo) balances two lives: she’s a pencak silat instructor and a cleaning service worker at Rizki’s (Mahdy Reza) college. Rizki, who is nursing a broken heart after being cheated on, desperately needs a distraction. He asks Deva to pose as his new girlfriend to impress his mother, leading to a fake relationship filled with kicks and complications.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manusia Silver Gantengnya Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Dewa (Lavicky Nicholas) moves to the big city with one goal: to get rich and marry his girlfriend back home. But his urban adventure takes a weird turn when he meets Dewi (Larasati Nugroho), a woman who makes a living through a very peculiar and unexpected profession.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ORDER AYAM DAPET JODOH
programme.desc: Reta (Angelica Simperler) is a beautiful but incredibly spoiled woman. After hitting Dion (Qausar Harta Yudana) with her car, she arrogantly offers him money instead of an apology. Disgusted by her behavior, Reta’s mother forces her to live and work with Dion for two months to learn humility and change her ways.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Jalan Ke Hatimu
programme.desc: Siska (Aisyah Aqilah) spends her days managing a corn plantation and selling various corn-based treats. Her peaceful life is disrupted when she nearly crashes her truck into Rangga (Junior Roberts), a handsome man who, unbeknownst to her, has been arranged to be her husband by her grandfather. Rangga’s true motive? To marry Siska only so he can sell off her beloved plantation.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH
programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU

programme.title: Cinta Kita Ngeri Ngeri Sedap
programme.desc: Sasi (Larasati Nugroho) is a martial arts expert and a gifted athlete, yet she constantly suffers from bad luck-mostly caused by Juna (Hardi Fadhillah). However, as Sasi faces a string of heartbreaks and betrayals from her boyfriends, she realizes that Juna is the only one who has ever truly stayed by her side through thick and thin.

programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 夜北与大晁发生战争，大晁君主彧修明斩杀七海震宇，夜北战败。叶凌霜被俘，后利用智谋得到谢雨安的帮助逃到钦天监，被界海天收为徒弟。同时，她身上的琥珀石里困着星算大师云纹，二人达成合作。另一方面，彧修明决定迁移夜北人到越州，引起界海天和界诸婴的不满和困扰。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 好搭档
programme.desc: 讲述人气离婚律师车恩京（张娜拉饰）陷入离婚危机，她与新人律师韩宥利（南志铉饰）经常因案件产生激烈冲突，一场律师间职场斗争即将上演。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵到法庭为十七作证，惜十七还是被入罪，在狱中重遇韦豪。十七一度被四海收买的囚犯追打，韦豪寸步不离保护他，囚犯们最终站在十七这边。花香在郊外拜祭时，意外见到四海也来附近拜祭，其后发现该墓地里没有尸体，只有一个古董钟。花香找到大虎的住处，在桂婵的威逼利诱下，大虎终于说出真相……

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 逍遥

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 阿夙得知大晁要屠杀夜北人，告知七海伶，二人尽力保护族人。同时，叶凌霜进入钦天监，改名白露，被彧修明要求在十天内算出星瀚大典的吉址。白露听到樊如晦和界海天的对话后，利用自己的聪明才智在彧修明和界海天之间周旋。她从云纹处得知芳华镜在苦渊海，因担忧七海蕊而偷偷出宫。

programme.title: Tanpa Cintamu Hidupku Bagai Soto Tanpa Kuah
programme.desc: Clara (Esta Pramanita) fought with Bram (Naufal Samudra) because her car couldn't pass because of Bram's soto cart. But who would have thought, it turns out that Bram is the biological son whose mother has been looking for. Clara's position began to be threatened and she felt that her mother's love would be divided.

programme.desc: The Gems take a trip to the moon.

programme.title: Intro/Haunted Tank/Warner Bros 100th Anniversary/Wishbone
programme.desc: Control Freak leads the Titans on a chase.

programme.title: Big Trouble Little Babies/Triple T Tigers/Panda's Family/A Tale Of Two Ice Bears/Unica
programme.desc: The Bears use a magic potion to get bigger.

programme.title: The New Frontier/Holly Jolly Secrets Part 1/Holly Jolly Secrets Part 2/Marceline's Closet/Incendium
programme.desc: When Jake has a dream that predicts when his last days are, Finn intervenes when the events of the dream start to actually happen.

programme.title: Mr. Greg/The New Lars/Beach City Drift
programme.desc: Steven, Greg and Pearl take a trip to Empire City.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Samuel Gerard and his team of Marshals are assigned to track down Sheridan, who has been accused of a double-murder.

programme.title: Baby Boom
programme.desc: The life of super-yuppie J.C. is thrown into turmoil when she inherits a baby from a distant relative.

programme.title: Knight and Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Apollo 13 is an inspiring and riveting story of the real-life space flight that gripped a nation and changed the world.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Samuel Gerard and his team of Marshals are assigned to track down Sheridan, who has been accused of a double-murder.

programme.title: Baby Boom
programme.desc: The life of super-yuppie J.C. is thrown into turmoil when she inherits a baby from a distant relative.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc: In a tale of love lost and found again, two ordinary people are rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie's mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: #RevengeOfTheBritBrats
programme.desc: British con artists Gwen and Ruby return and, while pretending to be friendly, drive a wedge between Sam and Cat. When Sam and Cat catch on to this, they turn the tables on Gwen and Ruby.

programme.title: Mutant Battle Arena
programme.desc: Raph's brothers just don't get him. He NEEDS to fight! He's good at it too, according to his new trainer Spuds. But even though they don't see eye to eye, the Turtles must work together to stop a rampaging Bebop and Rocksteady from wrecking the city!

programme.title: Mutantweight Title Bout
programme.desc: All of Raph's dreams have come true as he fights Rocksteady, Bebop, and Mondo Gecko in the underground Mutant Battle Arena. But he doesn't realize he's walked right into a trap set by Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons!

programme.title: Swamp Mates / One Trick Sponge
programme.desc: Bubble Bass finds himself stranded with Patrick in a mysterious swamp, looking for a lost action figure. // SpongeBob learns a new magic trick, but he can't find anyone to watch it.

programme.title: The Krusty Bucket / Squid's on a Bus
programme.desc: Plankton creates a clone of himself and Mr. Krabs, but neither restaurant is safe from the newcomer. // Squidward gleefully switches jobs with a bus driver for an easy ride... until SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: Fair Share / Power Plant
programme.desc: Sharing isn't easy for the twins and after a particularly heated argument they decide split the treehouse in half. // In order to win a local gardening competition, Best attempts to grow a plant, and Bester decides to be a plant.

programme.title: Best Fwends / The Trivialist Pursuit
programme.desc: Bester's new pet comes between her and her brother. There's nothing to it, Best must splat the cockroach! // Best and Bester go on an epic quest for a talking whale to prove they answered a board game question correctly.

programme.title: Terror on Tape
programme.desc: The Stars watch a series of haunted video tapes.

programme.title: Late for Breakfast / Bummer Jobs
programme.desc: Patrick presents a show about food after missing out on a hearty breakfast. // Patrick and SpongeBob experience the wonders of the workforce.

programme.title: The Krusty Slammer / Pineapple RV
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse after Plankton breaks the law, but crime only pays for so long. // SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: Bulletin Board
programme.desc: SpongeBob erects a community bulletin board in the Krusty Krab, but anonymous reviews posted on it lead to trouble.

programme.title: Summer of Secrets
programme.desc: Chloe must attend summer school, and Max is assigned to be her teacher. While they will be busy all summer, Phoebe decides to go solo on missions. She meets a new superhero named Captain Perfect, and discovers they make a good crime-fighting team.

programme.title: Family Lies
programme.desc: It's Parents' Night at SW.A.G. and Ray must get Danger Force to take a picture with their parents in the school or be shut down. But things get complicated when Chapa hires Jake Hart to be her fake dad.

programme.title: Captain Mom
programme.desc: Captain Man is being a baby about having a baby. Labor pains leave him helpless so Kid Danger and Piper step up to take on a couple of slick grease thieves.

programme.title: Bulking and Sulking / Wild Goss Chase
programme.desc: Dad struggles to run Lynn's Table when his brother Lance opens up a gym above the restaurant. // Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: Future Tense / Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. // Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: Zach Attack
programme.desc: Zach and Rusty fake an alien landing that sends the whole town on a hunt for little green men.

programme.title: Say 'Awww!'/ Patrick the Mailman
programme.desc: Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww!" // Patrick crushes the mailman, so he and SpongeBob deliver the mail around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Captain Pipsqueak/Plane to Sea
programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L. // SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.title: Hysterical History
programme.desc: On a trip to the museum, SpongeBob and Patrick teach Sandy all about Bikini Bottom's fascinating, yet questionable, history.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Movie Stars / Dr. Smart Science
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob work at the movie theater to watch a new premiere. // With Sandy's guidance, Patrick hosts a science show.

programme.title: The Fun Bucket
programme.desc: The Stars celebrate Patrick's birthday at the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: One of the Boys / A Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

programme.title: Funny Business / Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant but starts hogging the spotlight. // The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: The Price of Admission / One Flu Over the Loud House
programme.desc: After seeing a scary movie (that his parents told him not to), Lincoln can't go to sleep and pulls an all-nighter. // When a common cold ravages through the loud house, Lincoln believes his sisters have turned into Zombies!

programme.title: Study Muffin / Homespun
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: Halmoni Learns the Internet
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER!

programme.title: Prison Break
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment.

programme.title: Jack's Day Off
programme.desc: Jack volunteers to run the Groom & Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.title: The Fishbowl / Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy tries to study SpongeBob and Patrick's behavior, but her science experiment goes horribly awry. // Mr. Krabs takes Plankton's advice, and finally marries the only thing he ever loved...money!

programme.title: King Plankton
programme.desc: Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself down and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: City Slickers / Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed. // The family has a new plan to dodge Luan's April Fool's Day pranking: stunt doubles

programme.title: Net Gains / Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Lynn desperately wants to win a basketball championship but gets drafted onto a terrible team. // Mom and Dad are sick of waiting in the long bathroom line so they decide to build a secret bathroom.

programme.title: Jeers for Fears
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears.

programme.title: Halmoni Learns the Internet / The Library
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER! // Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: Green Fingers
programme.desc: After Schwoz creates a disease that accidentally effects Charlotte, Henry, his family, and even Ray, he quarantines them in Henry's house in order to find a cure.

programme.title: iCarly Awards
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie present iCarly Awards for best user-generated content, giving the awards to the winners live on the web show. Spencer enlists European swimsuit models to help him make the awards statuettes.

programme.title: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Lay Lay's Par-Tay-Tay
programme.desc: Determined to make their first party a hit, Lay Lay and Sadie brag to the entire school they've booked the Good Newz Girls to perform. Now all they have to do is make the idea a reality.

programme.title: Heavy Meddle / Making the Case
programme.desc: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

programme.title: Driving Miss Hazy / No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. // Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their 'baby'sitter.

programme.title: Halmoni Learns the Internet / The Library
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER! // Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: Big Top Flop / Sandy, Help Us!
programme.desc: When the circus comes to town and steals his customers away, Mr. Krabs tries to sabotage the show. // Sandy spends the day solving everyone's issues, only to return home to her own monster of a problem.

programme.title: At Home, On the Lam / Pick Patrick's Path
programme.desc: Bunny must punish Patrick for chocolate-flavored crimes. // The Lawnies vote for what Patrick does next.

programme.title: Enemies a la Mode
programme.desc: The members of the Star family each confront their own absurd rivalries.

programme.title: The Price of Admission / One Flu Over the Loud House
programme.desc: After seeing a scary movie (that his parents told him not to), Lincoln can't go to sleep and pulls an all-nighter. // When a common cold ravages through the loud house, Lincoln believes his sisters have turned into Zombies!

programme.title: Appetite for Destruction / Frame on You
programme.desc: When Lily starts misbehaving at home, Mom and Dad think her new preschool friends might be the cause. // When Rusty is wrongfully suspended, the Action News Team leaps into action to clear his name.

programme.title: Halmoni Learns the Internet / The Library
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER! // Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: Caught Rubber - Handed / And...Action!
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents. // Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.title: Kenny the Cat / Yeti Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny The Cat. // Attempting to get more work out of Squidward, Mr. Krabs spins the story of the monstrous Yeti Crab, which eats lazy workers.

programme.title: 出笼马骝
programme.desc: 故事描述，程小东因误杀罪入狱，一死囚临终前交予他半爿铜牌，嘱他寻找另半爿铜牌，当会知其妙用。后程在狱中结识侯朝声，一同逃狱；逃亡期间二人得悉铜牌牵涉到一段江湖恩怨，且始知彼此身上均有半爿铜牌，一凑合即出现「长白之巅，猛虎之岭」八个字，另有山脉图绞，二人凭线索去到长白山猛虎岭找出「通臂拳」秘笈，遂苦练拳法以力敌追兵...

programme.title: 中华丈夫
programme.desc: 何滔乃日本华裔商人之子，长大后武艺超凡。滔承父之命与日商之女弓子结婚，岂料妻子原来也练得一身出色的日本武术，两人不时为斗气而比武。有日弓子更斗气返回娘家，滔图以激将法写信约弓子回来比武，岂料信被其他日本人看到，以为滔想向日本武术宣战，滔遂与日本武术界展开连场激斗...

programme.title: 玫瑰我爱你
programme.desc: 十八岁的玫瑰在澳门结识了富家子家聪。太平洋战争爆发，两人被迫分手。七年后，玫瑰得知家聪结婚，伤心痛哭。玫瑰婚后，丈夫去世，开了一间花店，一天，小女孩来买花，才知小女孩是自己女儿，更与家聪重遇...文艺导演秦剑的爱情悲喜剧，保持作深情，感人之水准。

programme.title: 第三类打斗
programme.desc: 全片由"天堂"、"人间"、"地狱" 三个故事组成，带领观众穿梭三个时空。巡宫仙使辛灵，则是贯穿全片的核心人物。他最初因掩护仙界同僚逃出天宫， 而被贬落凡间，在人间因营救逃亡夫妇，不幸重伤身亡，到了地狱又协助冤鬼杀死仇敌。

programme.title: 倩女幽魂
programme.desc: 年轻书生宁采臣在传说闹鬼的恐怖寺庙里过夜。虽然他不相信传闻，却遇上美丽的女鬼聂小倩。原来聂小倩被困在寺庙中，诱使年轻男子给魔头姥姥享用。宁采臣得悉聂小倩为一只善良的女鬼，于是决定助她逃离魔掌。

programme.title: 射雕英雄传续集
programme.desc: 欧阳锋得悉郭靖以九阴真经的功夫于选婿比武中获胜，并娶得黄蓉为妻，于是把黄蓉挟走，要胁郭靖要默写九阴真经才会释放黄蓉。最终郭靖会否为救出黄蓉而就范？

programme.title: 猎人
programme.desc: 花花公子周国雄有一本「猎人日记」专门去记录他四出猎艳的故事，周丢弃刘明华，又去追猎吕绮美，刘突然遭人杀死。后来周又去追求女学生朱丽珍...但当晚，吕遭杀死，警方向周追查。同时周想到和他亲近的女人，一个一个的被杀死，嫌凶渐指向他，好像有人在陷害自己。周开始追查真相。

programme.title: 洪文定三破白莲教
programme.desc: 白莲教主六十余岁，红颜白发，练就绝招，能闭全身穴道，武功高深莫测，却甘作满清鹰犬，暗中协助师侄高进忠，消灭反清志士及破坏重建少林寺；洪文定为少林英雄洪熙官之子，曾击毙白之师弟白眉道人，名震江湖。白与高侦知洪住反清志士胡亚彪家中，夜袭杀胡及其妹，洪幸护着身怀六甲的胡妻突围逃走...

programme.title: 花木兰
programme.desc: 花木兰因父亲年事已高，毅然女扮男装替父从军，对战匈奴。她英勇善战，屡立奇功，更被擢升为大将军。木兰衣锦还乡，为家族赢得了无上的荣光。元帅欲将女儿许配给她的时候，才得知她是女儿身。

programme.title: 凤飞飞
programme.desc: 凤飞飞为报姐仇，发现凶手竟为未来夫婿金连白，不知所措。而杀姐夫之凶手萧豹与梁霸为除后患，与金夫人联手对付飞飞，欲灭绝凤家。飞飞怒不可遏，合父母之力将恶贼击毙。

programme.title: 金石情
programme.desc: 刘贞莲不幸身患麻疯，其父刘员外招赘穷书生李孝文为婿，意图卖疯传毒。贞莲将真相和盘托出，孝文感于贞莲真情，决意回乡禀明母亲，迎接贞莲返家。孝文走后，贞莲万念俱灰，竟狂饮毒酒，以图自尽...

programme.title: 大旗英雄传
programme.desc: 铁中棠乃大旗门掌门云翼之义子，因门派宝藏之秘密而遭宿敌司徒笑追杀。为解开身世与宝藏之谜，他远赴长春岛寻访「日后」，却发现她早已离世。岂料在岛上意外遇见大旗门真正的创派掌门「夜帝」，而夜帝亦亲口揭露，自己正是铁中棠的生父。

programme.title: 三笑
programme.desc: 风流才子唐伯虎邂逅了丫鬟秋香，被她所吸引，遂决定隐瞒身份，进入华家作书僮，藉此接近秋香，并向她表明自己的身份和来意，可惜秋香并不相信。最后，唐伯虎凭藉其出众的个人才智及好友的协助下，终于抱得美人归。

programme.title: Today's Close-Up

programme.title: The Case Of The Pink Lettuces
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening at the farm - all Farmer Tom's lettuces have been painted pink! Farmer Tom is really upset so Noddy offers to investigate. After talking to PatPat and Smartysaurus he realises that the Ninjas had asked Smartysaurus to make them pink paint so that they could paint the lettuces. They were using them as pom-poms to cheerlead Pink Ninja as she ran the Toyland Marathon Race! The Ninjas are very sorry that they upset Farmer Tom but he tells them that it's alright.

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Jigsaw Puzzle Pieces
programme.desc: When some pieces from Big Ears' jigsaw puzzle go missing, Noddy investigates: where are the missing pieces? He soon realises someone must have taken them and draws up a list of suspects. Having discounted the Pirates and then the Naughticorns, Noddy is baffled. But when Pat-Pat and the Pockets invite him to share a piece of toy cake, Noddy suddenly has a breakthrough: maybe it wasn't one toy who took lots of pieces but lots of toys who each took one piece.

programme.title: Why Bees Sting
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Bees didn't sting. All the animals loved the Bees and they especially loved their sweet and yummy honey. The trouble was all the precious honey was disappearing and there was a honey crisis in Tinga Tinga. Something had to be done. Luckily clever old Tortoise has a cunning plan. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Peacock Struts
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Peacock didn't strut. He was a very proud bird and he wanted to be the best at everything. He wanted to be the best bird-brain in Tinga Tinga. He wanted to be the best flyer in Tinga Tinga and he wanted to have the biggest and the best tail in Tinga Tinga…. But as Lion so wisely points out ‘Sometimes it's not good to get everything you want!' Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Clippy Claws
programme.desc: Pat has a very special delivery today! Micawber's claws need clipping and Pat needs to deliver not only the claw clippers but Amy the vet too! On the way to the lighthouse though they encounter all sorts of animals needing help today - from a poorly Bonnie with a cold to a fretful Pumpkin who doesn't want to take his horse pills!

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Sorting Machine
programme.desc: Pat and Jess are called to Cardiff to collect a new sorting machine when the Pencaster machine breaks down.

programme.title: Mum's The Word
programme.desc: Christine (Big Chris' mum) is visiting Silver hatch. As is Mamma Mia… serious competition ensues!

programme.title: How The Hatch Was Won
programme.desc: Tin Top is feeling homesick so Big Chris tries to cheer him up. But who could that pesky varmint causing trouble on the track be?!

programme.title: Go Gadget James And Maxi
programme.desc: Maxi is jealous of all of James' gadgets, or more precisely, the attention the other cars give him. He persuades Molecom to devise some gadgets for him… with hilarious results

programme.title: Mr Carburettor Or Bust
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has commissioned a bust of himself for Silver Hatch. Disaster strikes when it is dropped, Big Chris tries to make amends, while Marsha distracts Mr Carburettor and the reporter

programme.title: The Case Of The Moving Train Tracks
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings is having a fairy picnic in Fable Forest that evening. Everyone offers to help set up for the picnic but Queen Sparklewings tells them not to worry - the fairies can do it all. Later, when Noddy and all his friends are approaching Fable Forest Station on the train they discover someone has redirected the train tracks. They can't get to Fable Forest. How will they have the picnic in time? Noddy needs to investigate why the train tracks have been moved.

programme.title: The Case Of The King Of Toyland
programme.desc: Noddy returns from a Make and Take party at Pat-Pat's and finds the Builders are constructing a big orange palace in Toy Green. by order of the King of Toyland! Noddy decides to investigate: who is the mysterious King of Toyland? He spots the Knights carrying a royal litter, but all he can see inside is the top of an orange crown. Realising the King's favourite colour must be orange, Noddy remembers seeing Pat-Pat painting a bowl of oranges and wonders if she knows who the King is.

programme.title: The Case Of The Flyaway Balloons
programme.desc: Everyone is decorating special balloons in Toyland. They're going to have a big Balloon Release at the end of the day and see how far they can fly. But when Noddy returns in the afternoon with Big Ears, the balloons have already flown away! Noddy decides to investigate. Following all the clues, he arrives at Deltoid's house. The action hero toy tells him that he only took back his specially decorated balloon. The others were still there earlier.

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Brick
programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are building a toy tower. Carlton is joining in and having a great time. They've almost finished when one of the brick pieces goes missing! Oh no. How can they finish the tower without the last brick? Noddy needs to investigate. Using his detecting skills Noddy soon finds the missing brick.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: Tanaka's Moving Castle / Zenko Don't Go
programme.desc: Mr. Tanaka is moving places all by himself, so Team Zenko step in to assist, and learn the importance of asking people for help. / When Sam's skateboard competition falls on the same day as her favourite creator Ken KaBlam's comic book signing, TZG secretly prevents him leaving town before she gets the chance to meet him.

programme.title: Chore Score / Dew Drop Swap
programme.desc: On Harper’s first allowance day, the pets accidentally knock Harper’s Piggy Bank over and lose one of her quarters that she was reserving to buy Nicholas an ice cream cone. Now the Dew Drops must scramble to replace it! / When the Dew Drops struggle to help their kids with tasks that are outside their usual fairy-bilities, they decide to swap kids for the day, but ultimately learn they’ re exactly where they need to be because they know their families so well!

How can they finish the tower without the last brick? Noddy needs to investigate. Using his detecting skills Noddy soon finds the missing brick.

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Berry Race / The Artist
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Winkly Fest / Snow
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Old Dog, New Tricks \ Snoozie-Hullabaloozie
programme.desc: Tag chooses to pair up with her Grandpaw for the Barker Family Talent Show, and together, they search for their winning talent. \ Tag is surprised to learn that today is the Pawston Snoozie-a-Hullabaloozie. With everything shut down for the day, Tag and Scooch take the opportunity to play all over town, while trying not to wake up other dogs.

programme.title: Show Dog, Show \ Keys to Victory
programme.desc: Tag can't wait to show off her car at the car show. But when Cheddar Biscuit wants to come along and pick up her clown friends along the way, Tag is wary that Cheddar Biscuit will steal her thunder. \ The Not Yet Cadets can't wait to watch Sam’s big race. But when Sam loses his car key, he challenges the Not Yet Cadets to race around town to find it.

programme.title: Slide
programme.desc: Half dinosaur! Half construction truck! Full-on fun! Watch giant Ty Rux, his little buddy Revvit and the crew come face-to-face with evil D-Structs.

programme.title: Lucky and the Resolutionary Fever
programme.desc: Lucky rushes to complete all of last year’s resolutions before the clock strikes midnight on New Year’s Eve

programme.title: They Might Be Sky Giants / The Grugest Story Ever Told
programme.desc: After getting hit on the head, Eep has a vision and sets out to get the Valley to show how thankful they are; Grug feels like he's the biggest joke in Ahhh Valley, so he asks Thunk to make a "buy-o-pic" of him to show people just how truly great he is

programme.title: Worms Of Endearment / Dr Strangegrug Or How I Learned To Stop Worrying And Love The Spear
programme.desc: Lerk and Thunk hide all the valley's worms in a cave to protect them from the hunters who want to use them as bait; Grug invents the spear and pitches it to the Valley as a tool that will change cavemanity forever!

programme.title: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: After a strange creature bites Tuffnut, he believes he'll turn into a legendary Lycanwing dragon when the moon is full unless his friends can save him

programme.title: Snoutlout Gets The Axe
programme.desc: When Snotlout and Astrid must fly a ceremonial battle axe to a family wedding, they must work together when an Armorwing dragon derails their plan

programme.title: Hide The Lightning
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: The Beast
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Boss thought that breaking his arm was painful;but the true pain starts at pediatrician Dr. Kevin’s "jokes." Boss enlists the playgroup babies to defang the doctor of his "comedian’s disease." Tim obsesses about keeping his little brother safe.

programme.title: Escape From Krinkle's
programme.desc: Boss has an opportunity to get his old job back at Baby Corp;but to get the interview;he’ll need the playgroup babies to help him escape Marsha Krinkle’s super-safe Bubbeezee playroom. Tim nearly misses Kabob Day at school.

programme.title: Puppy Party!
programme.desc: Boss comes face to face with his old nemesis;Bug The Pug;after the playgroup parents decide to throw a Puppy Party. Staci creates a "No-Paperworkist" movement to avoid Buddy From HR’s constant paperwork.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Monstrous Mayhem of the Massive Melviathan
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Savage Spite of the Slimy Salamangler
programme.desc: Krupp's campers take on rich rivals in a hoity-toity boat race that also features a revenge-obsessed giant salamander. Paging Captain Underpants!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Cunning Combat of the Covert Camoflush
programme.desc: The campers' splat-tastic game of paintball is rather rudely interrupted by a foul and formidable fiend known only as Camoflush.

programme.title: The Celestial Vault
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: The Final Key
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Ignition
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Shell Shocked Part 1
programme.desc: Hiccup doesn't know who to trust when Viggo and Ryker each tell him that the other has gone rogue, and is sidetracked when a new dragon attacks.

programme.title: Shell Shocked Part 2
programme.desc: An extremely powerful new dragon attacks Dragon's Edge, and Hiccup makes a dangerous alliance while the fate of the Dragon Eye hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Enemy Of My Enemy
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: The Eternal Knight Pt. 1
programme.desc: The Eternal Night covers Arcadia in shadow leading to a long awaited fight between the Trollhunter and Gunmar130226

programme.title: The Eternal Knight Pt. 2
programme.desc: To end the Eternal Night, Jim and the Trollhuntersmust risk everything in their battle against Gunmar.

programme.title: Escape From The Darklands
programme.desc: Toby, Claire, and Blinky work to keep the human world unaware of Jim’s absence as they look for ways to rescue him from the Darklands

programme.title: The Lotus
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: The Legend of Master Long-Tooth
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: In From the Cold
programme.desc: NCIS works with the CIA to discover what secrets are being kept by Captain Butler, an elderly former spy with dementia.

programme.title: Knight and Day
programme.desc: Things become tense when Knight is assigned to protect his wife after the home of a high-level defense contractor is attacked.

programme.title: Hardboiled
programme.desc: Torres receives intel from a confidential informant regarding top secret naval information that's at risk of being sold.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Chocolate!
programme.desc: The remaining five bakers must rise to the occasion as they bake chocolate bread and use it to make a dessert deli sandwich; in the elimination challenges, the bakers must create a dessert inspired by an iconic film genre.

programme.title: Middle Class Melodies
programme.desc: Raghava, a young man, runs an eatery in his village but wishes to open a small hotel in a nearby town. However, he faces challenges in his quest and must overcome them to succeed.

programme.title: Qaidi Band
programme.desc: Qaidi Band film revolves around seven innocent under-trials, who give a band performance in the prison to get into the good books of the authorities and secure their acquittal.

programme.title: Naseeb
programme.desc: When Pooja's father disapproves of her relation with Krishna, a humble man, he vows to become wealthy and returns to find that she is already married.

programme.title: Jaaneman
programme.desc: Suhaan, an aspiring actor, is in a fix when Piya files for divorce and forces him to pay a large amount as alimony. To avoid paying her, Suhaan uses Agastya's love for Piya and helps him woo her.

programme.title: Saajan Chale Sasural
programme.desc: A village-based singer attempts to find love and fame in the big city.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Kantara
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Dhokha Round D Corner
programme.desc: A criminal breaks into a married couple's home and takes the wife hostage, igniting a tense standoff that surfaces secrets and lies.

programme.title: Double Xl
programme.desc: Two plus-size women who are body-shamed, head to London to prove that dreams matter and challenge the societal norms for beauty.

programme.title: Bhaiyya Ji
programme.desc: A man stands up for his family and seeks revenge for the wrongs done towards his loved ones.

programme.title: Bell Bottom
programme.desc: An undercover agent code-named Bellbottom embarks on a covert mission to free 210 hostages held by hijackers.

programme.title: Binny & Family
programme.desc: Rebellious teenage Binny and her conservative grandfather from Bihar connect after a dramatic incident. Can the contrasting personalities bridge generational gaps and impact each other's lives?

programme.title: At Monte Verita
programme.desc: The day begins on Percorso Vita, with a bit of sport, before embarking on a cultural tour of Centro Monte Verita, with its energetic historic sites. Then visit the House of Tea and taste the typical Ticino matcha.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.
