programme.title: The hunter
programme.desc: Koko the hunter kills absolutely all animals. One day he comes across a frog who begs him to spare it. He refuses, and kills the frog. And that's when all Koko's misfortunes begin.

programme.title: Aza Yah
programme.desc: When the animals start behaving strangely, Yiblo and Dakon prepare to defend themselves. Aza Yah is in search of the path that leads to Kongoue.

programme.title: The nappy
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Let's play coach the coach
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Feeling blue
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: The cheeky tupapau
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil

programme.title: Enquetes De Region

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Les Harkis
programme.desc: Early 1960s: the Algerian war stretches on. Salah, Kaddour and other destitute young Algerians join the French army as 'Harkis'. When Algerian independence becomes a probability, things get difficult for the 'Harkis'. Considered as traitors by their compatriots, some hope to obtain asylum in France.

programme.title: A La Poussiere
programme.desc: For the last few months, Fazia has begun her days as a cleaner at the Martin-Pelissards', who are reluctant for her work to be legally declared. Then, one morning, an incident turns into a race against time and a desperate attempt to keep her job.

programme.title: Sur La Touche
programme.desc: Amra recently left her family to start her professional footballing career. But one weekend, she decides to go home out of worry for her grandparents' health.

programme.title: The sky is falling in
programme.desc: It's New Year's Day, but Leon is feeling down since he lost his eyesight on Christmas Eve. Doris wants to make the most of the ''holiday spirit'' to let Ricardo know that she wants to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: The scent of violets
programme.desc: Leon, still upset about the incident with Florence, perks up when he meets Violette. While Humberto questions his sexual orientation, Belinda makes a name for herself on social media and is offered an interesting collaboration.

programme.title: The part of the other
programme.desc: Leon finds inspiration in a book presented in class. He even has an idea for his novel. Ricardo wants to be financially independent and Benji offers him a job at the cafe. Francis has a work opportunity he cannot refuse.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 夜北与大晁发生战争，大晁君主彧修明斩杀七海震宇，夜北战败。叶凌霜被俘，后利用智谋得到谢雨安的帮助逃到钦天监，被界海天收为徒弟。同时，她身上的琥珀石里困着星算大师云纹，二人达成合作。另一方面，彧修明决定迁移夜北人到越州，引起界海天和界诸婴的不满和困扰。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 好搭档
programme.desc: 讲述人气离婚律师车恩京（张娜拉饰）陷入离婚危机，她与新人律师韩宥利（南志铉饰）经常因案件产生激烈冲突，一场律师间职场斗争即将上演。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵到法庭为十七作证，惜十七还是被入罪，在狱中重遇韦豪。十七一度被四海收买的囚犯追打，韦豪寸步不离保护他，囚犯们最终站在十七这边。花香在郊外拜祭时，意外见到四海也来附近拜祭，其后发现该墓地里没有尸体，只有一个古董钟。花香找到大虎的住处，在桂婵的威逼利诱下，大虎终于说出真相……

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: UCI Pro Series - Tour of Oman Stage 4 H/Ls
programme.desc: Relive all the drama from Stage 4 of the Tour of Oman where cyclists navigate the northern coast of Sohar to Al Sawadi Beach.

programme.title: Upper Austria Ladies Linz (500) SF 1 & 2
programme.desc: The Upper Austria Ladies Linz is a professional women's tennis tournament in the WTA Tour, first held in 1987. It is held at the Design Center Linz in Austria, featuring top-ranked players on indoor surfaces.

programme.title: Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters
programme.desc: A look back at the 119th edition of the Monte Carlo Masters from the Monte Carlo Country Club in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin, France.

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) Day 2 Session 1
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) Day 2 Session 2
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell (500) Day 4 Round 2
programme.desc: The Barcelona Open is a prestigious annual ATP Tour 500 men's tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Real Club de Tenis Barcelona-1899 in Spain. Founded in 1953, it is a key European clay-court event and serves as a significant precursor to the French Open.

programme.title: Qatar TotalEnergies Open
programme.desc: Catch all the thrills and spills from the Khalifa International Tennis and Squash Complex in Doha, Qatar.

programme.title: Finals
programme.desc: The Badminton Asia Championships is a tournament organized by governing body Badminton Asia to crown the best badminton players in Asia. It features competitions to determine the top badminton athletes across Asia in men's singles, women's singles, men's doubles, women's doubles, and mixed doubles.

programme.title: The Genoa Tip
programme.desc: A story that may end up crippling the network becomes more real; Maggie is un-friended.

programme.title: Iron Jawed Angels
programme.desc: Hilary Swank and Anjelica Huston star in this HBO Original Movie about the women's suffragette movement in 1920s America.

programme.title: Atomic Homefront
programme.desc: Probing the devastating impact of the illegal dumping of radioactive waste in North St. Louis communities, the moms-turned-advocates fight for answers.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: A doubting boy finds out first-hand that Santa exists when he goes aboard a magical train headed for the North Pole.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: An intelligence agent is suspected of betraying the nation, forcing her agent husband to choose between loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: Scripting A Murder
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer creates a toxic love triangle that spins out of control.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 夜北与大晁发生战争，大晁君主彧修明斩杀七海震宇，夜北战败。叶凌霜被俘，后利用智谋得到谢雨安的帮助逃到钦天监，被界海天收为徒弟。同时，她身上的琥珀石里困着星算大师云纹，二人达成合作。另一方面，彧修明决定迁移夜北人到越州，引起界海天和界诸婴的不满和困扰。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 好搭档
programme.desc: 讲述人气离婚律师车恩京（张娜拉饰）陷入离婚危机，她与新人律师韩宥利（南志铉饰）经常因案件产生激烈冲突，一场律师间职场斗争即将上演。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵到法庭为十七作证，惜十七还是被入罪，在狱中重遇韦豪。十七一度被四海收买的囚犯追打，韦豪寸步不离保护他，囚犯们最终站在十七这边。花香在郊外拜祭时，意外见到四海也来附近拜祭，其后发现该墓地里没有尸体，只有一个古董钟。花香找到大虎的住处，在桂婵的威逼利诱下，大虎终于说出真相……

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 医院一方要求桂婵决定可要接受第二次手术，做的话有一半机会死去，不做的话会有终身腰痛、记忆慢慢衰退等后遗症，桂婵迟迟下不了决定。十七和韦豪等人在牢房中发现一条未挖完的隧道，决定逃狱。桂婵调查到薇姨的父亲之死疑与四海有关，劝她尽快迷途知返，薇姨看似无动于衷。桂婵最终决定做手术，而十七亦挖好隧道；面对九死一生的未来，两人约定无论谁不幸离世，均会在天上等着对方。

programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶景清临终前将保护白露的使命交给了翼无忧，希望他前往天启守护白露。白露在天启努力寻找合适的吉址，最终选定了一个既不劳民又不伤财的位置，并得到了彧修明的认可。然而，这一举动引起了界海天和樊如晦的不满。另一方面，七海伶为了拯救夜北族民，心生杀彧修明的想法，并暗中联合他人计划行动。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: The World (2026)
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026)
programme.desc: Start your Thursday with all the news you need. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest overnight news, interviews and the top stories this morning, plus Catherine Murphy with sport and Nate Byrne with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026)
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026)
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Lorna Dunkley.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026)
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Find Me A Match S1
programme.desc: As the matchmakers send out their singles on first dates, we learn more about the matchmaker's own matches and what they think is the measure of a successful marriage.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia S4
programme.desc: Since the onset of the COVID19 pandemic the number of mental health calls received by Queensland ambulance has increased. All part of a day's work for professionals who go into each shift not knowing what lies ahead.

programme.title: The Other Disruptor - USA
programme.desc: When a young Muslim American who called himself a democratic socialist was elected Mayor of New York City the world took notice. Zohran Mamdani is America's new political star with an agenda to make his city affordable again.

programme.title: Planet America (2026)
programme.desc: President Trump threatens Hormuz blockade after US-Iran peace talks collapse without a deal. Plus Trump's favourite European, Viktor Orban, is swept from power, and the mystery over why Melania wanted to talk about Epstein.

programme.title: Richard Marles - Deputy Prime Minister and Minister for Defence
programme.desc: Deputy Prime Minister and Minister for Defence Richard Marles addresses the National Press Club on the "Launch of the 2026 National Defence Strategy and Integrated Investment Program".

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien (2026)
programme.desc: Jade Macmillan brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: Lehmo
programme.desc: Full time funny man Lehmo tries to whip up something French, whilst Alice tries to change his mind on mushrooms!

programme.title: The Pacific (2026)
programme.desc: The murky underworld of Fiji's growing drug trade, how the Pacific might break free from its reliance on fuel amid a global crisis, plus extreme weather batters communities across PNG, Solomon Islands and the North Pacific.

programme.title: Round 6 - Carlton v Collingwood
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Black Swans (Part 2) The Australian Dream
programme.desc: In the 1950s three quarters of Australians were homeowners. Nowadays, house prices have sky rocketed and younger generations largely feel locked out. So where did it all go wrong?

programme.title: Ambulance Australia S4
programme.desc: Since the onset of the COVID19 pandemic the number of mental health calls received by Queensland ambulance has increased. All part of a day's work for professionals who go into each shift not knowing what lies ahead.

programme.title: Play On S2
programme.desc: This episode looks at Fijian rugby in Melbourne, meeting a team of PALM Scheme workers, who have saved a club from collapse and are making a charge at the Grand Final. Plus we examine the ancient sport of Dragonboat.

programme.title: ABC Late News (2026)
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Jade Barker in Perth.

programme.title: The Business (2026)
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, investors, employees and businesses big and small. Presented by Alicia Barry.

Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World (2026)
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: 鹿鼎记 II
programme.desc: 「神龙教」教主龙儿奉命协助吴三桂推翻康熙皇帝，却反遭吴三桂陷害，幸得韦小宝相救才得以保命。于是龙儿以身相许，并把绝世武功传于韦小宝以对付吴三桂。最后，韦小宝更意外地从四十二章经中得知满清龙脉的秘密宝藏。

programme.title: 风流冤鬼
programme.desc: 红歌女阿花遭大户陶老爷奸杀，陶宅即常闹鬼，后陶老爷亦神秘死亡。陶之后人陶明嗜赌如命，更因鬼魂作怪而欠下钜款。明妻暗中将陶宅售予杨教授夫妇，即遇上怪事连篇...

programme.title: 盲战
programme.desc: 前特警队长东谷在任务中罹患永久性失明，之后更被胁迫要承担任务失败的责任。幸好东谷在女儿的陪伴下逐渐走出阴霾，并开始适应黑暗的世界。可是曾经的宿敌再度出现，令女儿陷入危险之中。东谷为救女儿，展开了一场生死盲战。

programme.title: 冰封侠重生之门
programme.desc: 明朝锦衣卫贺英被诬陷为弑君逆贼，三位结义兄弟奉命追杀。在生死对决之际，四人意外被冰封于时空裂隙。四百年后，他们在现代香港苏醒。一场跨越时代的宿命之战，于陌生都市再度引爆。

programme.title: 花心大少
programme.desc: 严钱声是一名自恃追女高手的富家花花公子，被母亲劝喻要成家立室。他在寻找生命中的女主角时，被两个追女高手挑战。到底他最后能否找到心中最爱?

programme.title: 白发鬼
programme.desc: 年轻俊秀，生于名门望族的日籍华人林保，自幼失去父母，与大学好友川村感情深厚。二人都对美少女琉璃子心存爱慕，但川村自怜身世，不敢与林保争夺，林保顺利娶得琉璃子为妻。林保出国公干期间，川村和琉璃子耐不住寂寞，有了奸情。不久之后，林保竟在一次滑雪中意外身亡...

programme.title: 零号追杀
programme.desc: 退出江湖的特工华叔，在老街以开古董店为生。一天，老街遭当地青龙帮强拆时，华叔隐藏的身份被暴露，并受到阿杰为首的神秘组织追杀，由此展开了一场双雄对决!

programme.title: 逃学威龙三之龙过鸡年
programme.desc: 富商王百万被发现离奇死于酒店房间，由于周星星与他极为相似，星星再次接受任务，作卧底调查这宗谋杀案。王百万生前与妻子感情早已破裂，妻子因此成为头号嫌疑人。然而，在调查过程中，星星发现王百万的友人林大岳同样形迹可疑......

programme.title: 黑白潜行
programme.desc: 香港警员阿山以卧底身份潜伏在监狱，接近罪犯天哥，以获取其犯罪集团的更多证据。二人获释后，阿山全力帮助天哥扶摇直上，最终使天哥成为集团的主脑。然而，当阿山协助警方顺利摧毁犯罪集团时，他却意外揭开了天哥的一个惊天秘密...

programme.title: 青蛇：前缘
programme.desc: 千年前，青蛇在道清的点化下逐渐开化，生出与道清相守之心。因自己对道清的执念，却导致道清进入轮回之劫，遭受世间横死之难。为了化解道清的劫难，数百年间，青蛇不断寻找转世的道清...

programme.title: 柠檬可乐
programme.desc: 就读女校高中的婷婷，因排演《罗密欧与茱丽叶》而与邻校男生Jackson戏假情真，爱情就在排练时萌芽。这是婷婷的初恋，但Jaskson却是一个变幻莫测的爱情玩家...

programme.title: 叶问 2
programme.desc: 日本侵华后，咏春大师叶问与家人因生活艰难离开佛山，远赴香港开馆收徒，希望可以开展新生活。但事情并未如所想般容易，他欲在香港开武馆，就必须接受各大门派的挑战。一场又一场的功夫较量正式展开！

programme.title: 摩登仙履奇缘
programme.desc: 陈七是职业惯匪，偷呃拐骗无所不为，但从不使用暴力；张曼珠是电视台新晋演员，收入微薄，生活拮据。一次偶然中，陈得到了一枚巨钻，欲找买家脱手，却遇杀手追杀，情急下将巨钻藏于某鞋店的一只高跟鞋内，后来，此鞋刚好被张买去参加舞会......

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 披荆斩棘3
programme.desc: 本季节目以"奋进"为内核，不仅延续了前两季的全景竞演综艺模式，还通过赛制、环节等方面的升级再度强化节目的竞技性。嘉宾们不断挑战、探索，展现男性的奋斗精神和个性魅力。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 长风渡
programme.desc: 自小受尽磨砺的徉州城布商之女柳玉茹与当地著名纨绔顾九思阴差阳错结为夫妻, 性格迥异的两人在错位婚姻里, 从相互抵触到相互扶持, 相互治愈。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Late last year PL Stories travelled to Dubai to spend time with Victor Moses, reflecting on a life and career shaped by resilience and determination. We delve into his difficult and deeply personal early years in Nigeria, and the tragic circumstances that led to him seeking asylum in the UK, an experience that would go on to define both his character and career.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: At just 21 years old, Alejandro Garnacho has already experienced more in his young career than many others do in a lifetime. Born in the Spanish captial, Garnacho started his career in the Atletico Madrid academy. Released as a teenager, the Argentina international moved to Manchester United, where he went on to make nearly 100 senior appearances for the club over three years before joining Chelsea in the summer.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: MATCH OFFICIALS MIC'D UP - TUES 14 APR
programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he's overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Ray Parlour spent 15 years with the Gunners, winning three Premier League titles during that time. His third was perhaps the most memorable of them all. The "Romford Pele" looks back at the 2003/04 campaign, the season of the Invincibles.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 13 APR
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: Join Togo and African football icon Emmanuel Adebayor as he relives his top 10 Premier League moments. From iconic goals to unforgettable rivalries, this inspiring and entertaining show is packed with candid insights, untold stories, and the passion that defined his career.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: As the curtain comes down on Everton's time at Goodison Park, PL Stories takes a poignant look back at one of English football's most iconic grounds. For over 130 years, Goodison has been more than just a stadium; it's been a home, a fortress, and the stage for countless moments of triumph, heartbreak, and unforgettable drama.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he's overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: For Nico Gonzalez, arriving at Manchester City on deadline day in February 2025 was a full circle moment. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Manchester City v QPR on the final day of the 2011/12 season will forever be remembered as the most dramatic of finales to a Premier League season. programme.title: The Letter Go Getters
programme.desc: Abby, Gabrielle, Rudy and Elmo are Letter Go Getters on a magical letter search.

programme.title: Volleybull! / Diferente es Excelente
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny perfect a new move in time for the championship volleyball game! // Dora and Boots run into Dulce the dragon on her way to the first day of school and show her that everyone's differences are what make them excellent!

programme.title: Gaucho Games / Princesa Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help their friend Catalina the Condor become an amazing Gaucha and save the Gaucho Games! // Dora and Boots meet Pilar the Princess Unicorn and help her get back to Unicorn Land!

programme.title: Clock and Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Barbabright Has a Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Splash Park / The Crew Builds A Playroom
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A School / The Crew Builds A Waterway
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: Katie's Arctic Road Trip / Pups Save A Magical Misha
programme.desc: Skye, Everest, Liberty, and Katie go on a camping adventure where they encounter a polar bear with a sweet tooth. // When Julia and Julius put on a twin-credible magic show, they are convinced they accidently turned Mr. Carter into a rabbit.

programme.title: Pups Save the Hum-Sprayer / Pups Save the Hot Springs
programme.desc: When Rubble's cousin Mix comes to town to paint a mural, Humdinger steals the paint and careens through the countryside. // When Mayor Goodway and Mayor Humdinger show up at Jake's new Hot Springs for a soak, three mountain goats chase them away.

programme.title: The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Family / The House of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: Ball
programme.desc: // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom.

programme.title: Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Car Wash / The Crew Plans Grandpa Day
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: Abuela's Quinceanera / Story Time
programme.desc: Dora finds out that her Abuela never had a quinceańera and throws her a super-secret surprise party with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! // Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one!

programme.title: Robots in Space
programme.desc: When Space Commander Megan is marooned on Pluto, our robot heroes will race through wormholes, shoot past ice volcanoes, and blast straight through an asteroid field to bring their new friend back home.

programme.title: Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for "later".

programme.title: Costume Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: The Construction Contest
programme.desc: To compete in the Axle City Construction Contest, Blaze and his friends turn into construction vehicles! But when Crusher sends them far away, it'll take all of their construction skills combined to make it back before time runs out.

programme.title: The Puppy Chase!
programme.desc: When a big bubble floats away with Gabby's new puppy, she'll team up with Blaze and AJ to get him back.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Turtle House / The Crew Builds A Giant Volcano
programme.desc: It's Friend Appreciation Day! But when Speed Meister's gift for Mr. McTurtle goes awry, he has to call Rubble & Crew for help. / Rubble & Crew help Lucas make the most awesome Science Fair volcano ever. But will Wingsy get in the way of the eruption?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Firefighter Training Center / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Space Show
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: Pups Save the Bears / Pups Save a Farmerless Farm
programme.desc: Bears are asleep all over town! The PAW Patrol must work quietly to save the bears and return them to their cave. // With the farmers out of town, Mayor Goodway calls the PAW Patrol to wrangle the animals and control the chaos on the farmerless farm

programme.title: Pups Save a White Wolf / Pups Save a Wrong Way Explorer
programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them. // Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into some crocodiles?

programme.title: Dora & Diego Rescue Baby Jaguar / Diego's Awesome Owl Adventure
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego rescue a baby jaguar after it gets lost deep in the rainforest. // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a baby burrowing owl find its parents and make it home.

programme.title: Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: Vinny
programme.desc: Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Captain Daddy Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pig's boat for a day on the river. Daddy Pig is the captain, Peppa, George and Mummy Pig are the crew. When the boat gets stuck in some long reeds. Daddy Pig has to use all his strength to push the boat free.

programme.title: The Quarrel
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are having a quarrel and decide they are not best friends anymore. As time goes by they really miss each other but they still refuse to make up.

programme.title: Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in the garden with their bouncy ball when Suzy Sheep turns up with two tennis rackets. She uses the bouncy ball to play a game of tennis with Peppa, making George feel left out. Will the job of ball boy cheer him up?

programme.title: The Powercut
programme.desc: One day all the lights suddenly go out and Peppa's house is plunged into darkness. There has been a power cut. While they wait for the electricity to come on again, Peppa and George have fun looking for a torch and thinking of games to play.

programme.title: Pretend Friend
programme.desc: Suzy Sheep has made up a pretend friend called "Leo Lion". Peppa cannot see Leo but Suzy says that Leo likes roaring and dressing up. Peppa decides that now she can see Leo. Even Mummy and Daddy Pig play along. But George feels a bit left out.

programme.title: Pen Pal
programme.desc: Peppa has a French pen pal, a girl donkey, named Delphine. They also speak to each other on the telephone. Although Peppa speaks English and Delphine speaks French, they discover that they love lots of the same things.

programme.title: Granny and Granpa's Attic
programme.desc: Peppa and George are helping Granny and Grandpa Pig tidy their attic, but it's hard to decide what to throw out. Amongst the clutter, Peppa finds an old record player and some funny old records.

programme.title: School Camp
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are going camping with Madame Gazelle. When it gets dark, they all sing a song around the campfire. When it is time for bed, Peppa and her friends get a little scared and all the children end up sleeping in Madame Gazelle's tent

programme.title: The Toy Cupboard
programme.desc: Peppa and George's toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys. Mummy Pig orders a new toy cupboard, but it needs to be assembled - and Mummy and Daddy Pig are not good at DIY.

programme.title: Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: Making Bread / From One Pit to Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: Stuck On You
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope.

programme.title: Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for "later".

programme.title: The Rocketship Ride
programme.desc: Darington can't wait to ride the Great Rocketship Ride, the tallest, fastest carnival ride in all of Axle City! But when Darington's tickets blow away, he and Blaze must go on an epic adventure to retrieve them!

programme.title: The Great Bedtime Race
programme.desc: It's nighttime in Axle City, and Blaze and AJ stumble upon the race of their dreams: the Great Bedtime Race! But Crusher is also in the race and he won't rest until he wins. Will Blaze come out on top, or will Crusher take home the Nightlight Trophy?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Popcorn Cafe / The Crew Fixes A Slippery Mess
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew switch to cleanup mode when construction on Cafe Carl's new popcorn restaurant pops out of control. // A soapy accident causes slippery mayhem all over Builder Cove. Can the pups clean it up in time for Mayor Greatway's big jump?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasure
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: Pups and the Stinky Bubble Trouble / Pups Save the Baby Ostriches
programme.desc: What's that smell? A strange odor is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes. // Olivia the Ostrich has fallen in to the canyon! The pups need to work together to lift her to safety, while keeping her soon-to-hatch eggs warm.

programme.title: Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar / Pups Save the Yoga Goats
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert! // Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! It's up to the Paw Patrol to find the goats and return them to Yumi's farm.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Family / The House of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨 及 世界观
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 谈判专家
programme.desc: 彭国栋与简洁是「警察谈判小组」内的梦幻组合，合作从未失手。私底下，栋对洁之大女人作风却不以为然。谈判小组招募新一届谈判专家，栋与洁各持己见。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 地球村民
programme.desc: 在全球化的大趋势，大家的生活息息相关。在八集节目中，邀请八位居港外国人分享其国家的文化特色。他们分别来自智利、乌克兰、日本、巴基斯坦、美国、瑞士等地。

programme.title: Holistic way+京都念慈庵:正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: 吴邪私家笔记 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 吴邪解读帛书地图，与三叔组队探古墓，遇怪兽、铜鱼揭三叔往事，神秘女子阿宁现身后三叔失踪，新冒险展开。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 地球大神秘2
programme.desc: 《地球大神秘》制作队从世界各地搜集到数以百计奇异事物内容，都是无法以一般人接受的观点加以解释，除非呢个世界有「超自然」的存在！节目将会让大家知道不可思议的神秘事物，不但在过去存在，而且目前仍然存在！

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导& 世界观 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 娱乐头条
programme.desc: 每晚紧贴香港娱乐圈的消息，以至世界各地的影视娱乐新闻，报道艺人最新动态、剧集和电影宣传、演唱会精华、颁奖礼盛况等，让大家瞬间掌握影视娱乐圈的动态和最新消息。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.title: 世界观
programme.desc: 由资深新闻工作者负责的《世界观》，带你用世界观、观世界，更阔更广看新闻、长知识。

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。
